sql_array: CREATE TABLE schedule (event_name VARCHAR(50), event_duration INTERVAL YEAR TO MONTH);
INSERT INTO schedule (event_name, event_duration) VALUES ('Conference', INTERVAL '2-3' YEAR TO MONTH);
UPDATE schedule SET event_duration = INTERVAL '1-0' YEAR TO MONTH WHERE event_name = 'Conference';
SELECT event_name, event_duration FROM schedule WHERE event_duration > INTERVAL '1-6' YEAR TO MONTH;
DELETE FROM schedule WHERE event_duration < INTERVAL '0-5' YEAR TO MONTH;
